The best thing to play about with, in your bathroom.

Walk around the chairs listening to Greg's story
The most brilliant thing that pops up.
Rotate the pulper wheel without pulping the egg.
Completely free yourselves and have a team hug.

Say the word given to you by the Taskmaster in the accent on the card you choose.
The best thing you take everywhere with you, but struggle to fit in your bag.
Pile the pineapples on the path.
Repurpose this umbrella and demonstrate its new purpose.
Pit the most stuff on top of this jelly, without breaking the jelly.
Using only the scratching posts, remove as many balls from your suit as possible.
The sneakiest thing.
